target_contract.purpose: Bind released client portal projection, mobile safe view and client-safe summary projection to one process-first state model without exposing internal workflow payloads in operational UI.
non_negotiables: Client visibility is released-only and fail-closed by default.
Advisor approval, evidence upload, evidence sufficiency, decision submission, export approval and download/share never equal client visibility.
Internal fields remain hidden from client roles unless explicitly classified as client-safe released payload.
AREA-08 proof belongs in typed readmodels, tests and explicit proof artifacts, not explanatory UI panels.
Operational UI may show object state, blocker and next action, but not process IDs, proof scaffolding or route-only claims.

states.meaning: No released client-safe object is available for the actor, tenant and object scope.
A released object has a client-safe summary projection and no forbidden payload fields.
Only redacted client-safe metadata may be projected; internal payload remains hidden.
The actor cannot view the target object or tenant scope.
Internal roles may inspect scoped internal payload; this state cannot be rendered to client-role surfaces.

step_contracts.positive_acceptance: Released client-visible payload projects only client-safe fields.
step_contracts.negative_acceptance: Unreleased, advisor-only, compliance-only or wrong-tenant payload projects no client payload.

step_contracts.positive_acceptance: Hidden/internal fields are listed as hidden in projection proof and absent from client payload.
step_contracts.negative_acceptance: Payload containing internal rationale, compliance notes, draft summary, audit metadata or storage/checksum fields fails the client-safe check.

step_contracts.positive_acceptance: Client communication/update action is available only when a safe projection is visible.
step_contracts.negative_acceptance: Pending or fail-closed projection does not display approved/released communication language.

step_contracts.positive_acceptance: Mobile view renders only released client-safe summary state.
step_contracts.negative_acceptance: Mobile view hides unreleased internal decision/evidence payload.

step_contracts.positive_acceptance: Mobile fail-closed state is explicit and non-leaky.
step_contracts.negative_acceptance: Internal notes, draft fields, audit metadata and evidence internals are absent from mobile client role UI.

step_contracts.positive_acceptance: Mobile next-step copy reflects released-safe status only.
step_contracts.negative_acceptance: Mobile next-step cannot imply advice release, export approval or client acceptance.

step_contracts.service_boundary: new DOMAIN-H released projection readmodel wrapping visibilityEngine
step_contracts.positive_acceptance: Summary is derived from released safe payload only.
step_contracts.negative_acceptance: Summary does not render from internal draft, submitted-only decision or export preview-only state.

step_contracts.positive_acceptance: Internal fields are hidden/redacted and the hidden-field list is testable outside operational UI.
step_contracts.negative_acceptance: Any forbidden client field produces a failed proof state and no client-visible summary.

step_contracts.positive_acceptance: Approved client-safe summary can be communicated only when safe projection is visible.
step_contracts.negative_acceptance: Approved/communicated language is absent for fail-closed, pending, internal or wrong-scope projections.

new_or_refactored_contract_allowed: A small DOMAIN-H released projection readmodel/contract module may be added if it wraps existing visibilityEngine behavior and only records proof mapping.
No schema migration is authorized by this spec.
No new API route is authorized unless implementation finds a real UI/service boundary that cannot be represented with existing route data.

required_positive_tests: Released decision projects client-safe fields for portal.
Released decision projects client-safe fields for mobile.
Client-safe summary readmodel maps BP-067/BP-068/BP-069 steps to proof refs.
required_negative_tests: Advisor approval/evidence upload/export approval alone does not create client visibility.
Operational UI does not expose internal proof/process scaffolding.

implementation_split.EPIC-13-IMPL-01A: Refactor/create AREA-08 entry behavior around released projection next work without explanatory cards.
implementation_split.EPIC-13-IMPL-01B: Create DOMAIN-H readmodel/contract and bind core surfaces to BP step ownership.
implementation_split.EPIC-13-IMPL-01C: Wire proof/audit/client-safe boundaries into non-operational proof artifacts and tests, not visible proof panels.
implementation_split.EPIC-13-IMPL-01D: Update matrix/status artifacts for completed DOMAIN-H steps.

definition_of_done.positive_and_negative_paths: Covered by named tests or explicit implementation proof.
